Our Niche

We Only Serve
Kumaon Hospitality.

Hotels, homestays, cafés, resorts, and heritage properties in Nainital, Mukteshwar, Corbett, Ranikhet, Almora, Binsar — this is our territory. Deep niche = deep expertise = guaranteed results.

NainitalMukteshwarJim CorbettRanikhetAlmoraBinsarBhimtalKausani
🏔️
Heritage Properties
Colonial-era hotels and heritage havelis
🌿
Nature Retreats
Eco-lodges, forest camps, wildlife resorts
🏡
Homestays & B&Bs
Authentic Kumaoni family experiences
☕
Cafés & Restaurants
Local cuisine and mountain dining
What We Do

360° Marketing
Under One Roof.

We handle everything — so you focus on running your property, not chasing agencies.

01

Social Media

  • Content creation
  • Founder profile
  • Reels & stories
  • Community management
02

Website Design

  • Brand identity
  • UI/UX Design
  • Development
  • Booking integration
03

Lead Generation

  • Meta & Google Ads
  • Email marketing
  • Influencer outreach
  • Ad funnel strategy
04

AI-First Services

  • AI video content
  • Listing creatives
  • Product photography
  • AI avatar creation
Our Value Prop

Strategy, Execution,
and Long-Term Growth.

01

Strategic Architecture

Moving beyond 'tasks' to high-level vision. We map your property's growth journey from first impression to full occupancy.

02

Creative Execution

Bridging the gap between Kumaon's raw beauty and digital storytelling — content that converts.

03

Future-Proofing

Integrating AI-based solutions and automation so your marketing engine keeps running without constant oversight.

What Clients Say

About Shikhar

We Take Away
3 Tasks from
Your List.

MarketingTechnologyStrategy

Shikhar Media is the marketing arm of OrbitAIM Technologies — a Kumaon-based MartTech consultancy. We democratize world-class marketing for the properties that make our hills worth visiting.

Our sister products include orbitaim.io (AI-powered SaaS) and orbitaim.com (full-service consultancy). You just focus on growth.

Let's Build Together

Ready to Fill
Every Room?

Tell us about your property. We'll map out a custom growth strategy for your Kumaon hospitality brand — no fluff, just results.
